Typhlosion

#0156 Quilava #0158 Totodile
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Typhlosion is a Fire type Pokémon introduced in Generation 2.

Typhlosion has a Hisuian Form, introduced in Pokémon Legends: Arceus.

Typhlosion Hisuian Typhlosion

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0157
Type Fire
Species Volcano Pokémon
Height 1.7 m (5′07″)
Weight 79.5 kg (175.3 lbs)
Abilities 1. Blaze
Flash Fire (hidden ability)
Local № 0006 (Gold/Silver/Crystal)
0006 (HeartGold/SoulSilver)
0006 (Legends: Arceus)
0178 (The Indigo Disk)

Training

EV yield 3 Sp. Atk
Catch rate 45 (5.9% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 267
Growth Rate Medium Slow

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 87.5% male, 12.5% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

#0155
Cyndaquil
Fire
(Level 14, or Level 17 in Legends: Arceus)
#0156
Quilava
Fire
(Level 36)
#0157
Typhlosion
Fire
(Level 36, in Legends: Arceus)
#0157
Typhlosion
Hisuian Typhlosion
Fire · Ghost

Typhlosion changes

  • In Generation 8, Hisuian Typhlosion has Flash Fire as its hidden ability.
  • In Generations 2-4, Typhlosion has a base experience yield of 209.
  • In Generations 5-7, Typhlosion has a base experience yield of 240.
  • In Generations 2-7, Typhlosion has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Typhlosion

Gold If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.
Silver It has a secret, devastating move. It rubs its blazing fur together to cause huge explosions.
Crystal When heat from its body causes the air around it to shimmer, this is a sign that it is ready to battle.
Ruby
Sapphire		 TYPHLOSION obscures itself behind a shimmering heat haze that it creates using its intensely hot flames. This POKéMON creates blazing explosive blasts that burn everything to cinders.
FireRed It has a secret, devastating move. It rubs its blazing fur together to cause huge explosions.
LeafGreen If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.
Emerald It can hide behind a shimmering heat haze that it creates using its intense flames. TYPHLOSION create blazing explosive blasts that burn everything to cinders.
Diamond
Pearl
Platinum		 It attacks using blasts of fire. It creates heat shimmers with intense fire to hide itself.
HeartGold If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.
SoulSilver It has a secret, devastating move. It rubs its blazing fur together to cause huge explosions.
Black
White
Black 2
White 2		 It attacks using blasts of fire. It creates heat shimmers with intense fire to hide itself.
X If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.
Y It has a secret, devastating move. It rubs its blazing fur together to cause huge explosions.
Omega Ruby
Alpha Sapphire		 Typhlosion obscures itself behind a shimmering heat haze that it creates using its intensely hot flames. This Pokémon creates blazing explosive blasts that burn everything to cinders.
Brilliant Diamond
Shining Pearl		 It attacks using blasts of fire. It creates heat shimmers with intense fire to hide itself.

Hisuian Typhlosion

Legends: Arceus Said to purify lost, forsaken souls with its flames and guide them to the afterlife. I believe its form has been influenced by the energy of the sacred mountain towering at Hisui’s center.

Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Typhlosion does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Typhlosion cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by level up

Typhlosion learns the following moves in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet at the levels specified.

Move
Type
Cat.
Power
Acc.

1EmberFire 40 100
1EruptionFire 150 100

Moves learnt on evolution

Typhlosion learns the following moves when it evolves in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet (regardless of level).

Hisuian Typhlosion
Move
Type
Cat.
Power
Acc.
Infernal ParadeGhost 60 100

Egg moves

Typhlosion learns the following moves via breeding or picnics in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. Details and compatible parents can be found on the Typhlosion gen 9 learnset page.

Type
Cat.
Power
Acc.

CurseGhost — —

typhoon
tropical cyclone
explosion
eruption, blast
